meta.title: Kit — Browser tools that stay private
meta.description: PDF, images, media, converters, and text tools that run on your device. Nothing is uploaded to our servers.

brand.name: Kit
brand.tagline: Everyday tools in your browser. Private by design.

footer.copyright: © {year} Tim G (TGthms). Kit is open source under the MIT License.

common.pasteSupported: You can also paste from the clipboard
common.fileTooLarge: This file is large—processing may take a while.
common.clientSideOnly: Runs in your browser only. Your files are never sent to a Kit server.

home.title: What do you need to do?
home.subtitle: Handy tools that run on this device—no account, no uploads.
home.recent: Pick up where you left off
home.chooseCategoryHint: Open a group of related tools, or search everything above.

categories.pdfDesc: Merge, split, compress, and mark up PDF documents
categories.imageDesc: Compress, resize, convert, and retouch photos
categories.audioDesc: Convert, trim, and change speed of audio only
categories.videoDesc: Convert, trim, speed up, and pull audio from video
categories.convertDesc: Cross-format smart conversion (JSON, CSV, ZIP, images…)
categories.textDesc: Format, validate, encode, and compare text

history.title: History
history.subtitle: What you’ve run on this device. We only keep short summaries—never your files.
history.empty: No activity yet. Run a tool and it will show up here.
history.clearConfirm: Delete all history on this device?

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Tools you keep close for one-tap access.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Star a tool from Home or from its page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: These choices stay in this browser only.
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Removes local history summaries stored by this site.
settings.privacyNote: Kit works on your files in the browser. Preferences and history summaries may be saved locally. Full details are in the Privacy Policy.

pdf-merge.name: Merge PDFs
pdf-merge.description: Stack several PDFs into one. Preview pages and drag to reorder.
pdf-merge.keywords: pdf merge combine join stitch multipage
pdf-merge.empty: Add at least two PDF files.

pdf-split.name: Split PDF
pdf-split.description: Pull out a page range into a brand-new PDF.

pdf-organize.name: Organize pages
pdf-organize.description: Rotate pages, remove the ones you don’t need, and set a new order.
pdf-organize.keywords: pdf rotate delete reorder organize pages

pdf-compress.name: Compress PDF
pdf-compress.description: Shrink file size by re-encoding page images (quality trade-off).
pdf-compress.note: This is a lossy path—pages may be rasterized. Works best on image-heavy PDFs.
pdf-compress.success: Compressed PDF is ready to download.

pdf-watermark.name: Watermark PDF
pdf-watermark.description: Stamp text as a watermark, header, or footer on every page.
pdf-watermark.keywords: pdf watermark stamp header footer confidential

pdf-redact.name: Cover content
pdf-redact.description: Place solid black boxes over sensitive areas (visual cover).
pdf-redact.note: This is a visual cover only. It does not guarantee removal of every underlying text stream—double-check sensitive documents.

pdf-extract.name: Extract from PDF
pdf-extract.description: Pull readable text or export a page as an image.

image-compress.name: Compress images
image-compress.description: Dial quality and max size down so photos stay shareable.
image-compress.keywords: image compress jpg png webp size photo

image-resize.name: Resize images
image-resize.description: Set exact dimensions, with optional aspect-ratio lock.
image-resize.keywords: image resize scale dimensions width height

image-crop.name: Crop image
image-crop.description: Keep only the rectangle you care about.

image-convert.name: Convert image format
image-convert.description: Switch between JPEG, PNG, WEBP, and similar web formats.
image-convert.keywords: image convert format webp avif png jpg jpeg

image-metadata.name: Strip image metadata
image-metadata.description: Export a clean copy without EXIF and similar tags.
image-metadata.keywords: image exif metadata strip privacy location
image-metadata.note: Pixels are re-encoded in the browser so embedded metadata is dropped.

convert-hub.name: Smart convert
convert-hub.description: Detect mixed file or text types and convert across formats (not a media studio).
convert-hub.keywords: convert hub smart batch json yaml csv zip image data

json-format.name: JSON formatter
json-format.description: Pretty-print, minify, and catch JSON errors early.
json-format.keywords: json format validate minify pretty print
json-format.success: JSON looks valid and is formatted.

yaml-format.name: YAML formatter
yaml-format.description: Check YAML structure and tidy the layout.

toml-format.name: TOML formatter
toml-format.description: Validate TOML and keep the file neat.

markdown-html.name: Markdown ↔ HTML
markdown-html.description: Turn Markdown into HTML, or HTML back into Markdown.

csv-json.name: CSV ↔ JSON
csv-json.description: Move tabular data between CSV and JSON arrays.

text-diff.name: Text compare
text-diff.description: See line-by-line changes between two versions.

base64.name: Base64
base64.description: Encode or decode Base64 for plain text or whole files.

url-encode.name: URL encode
url-encode.description: Percent-encode or decode URL components safely.
url-encode.keywords: url encode decode percent uri query

audio-convert.name: Convert audio
audio-convert.description: Change audio containers such as MP3, WAV, and OGG in the browser.
audio-convert.keywords: audio convert mp3 wav ogg ffmpeg sound
audio-convert.note: Uses single-thread FFmpeg WASM. Large files can be slow; codec support is limited.

audio-trim.name: Trim audio
audio-trim.description: Keep only the stretch between two timestamps in an audio file.
audio-trim.keywords: audio trim cut clip mp3 wav

audio-speed.name: Audio speed & volume
audio-speed.description: Speed up, slow down, or change loudness of audio.

video-convert.name: Convert video
video-convert.description: Change video containers such as MP4 and WEBM in the browser.
video-convert.keywords: video convert mp4 webm ffmpeg movie
video-convert.note: Uses single-thread FFmpeg WASM. Large files can be slow; codec support is limited.

video-trim.name: Trim video
video-trim.description: Keep only the clip between two timestamps.

video-speed.name: Video speed & volume
video-speed.description: Change playback speed and audio level of a video.

video-extract-audio.name: Extract audio from video
video-extract-audio.description: Save the soundtrack from a video as an audio file.
